_meta.description: Children's book series. Canonical source of truth. Synopses marked draft:true are placeholder copy pending client-approved text.

books.title: Egypt the Cat
books.tagline: A magical little cat, a curious boy, and adventures that leap off the page.
books.synopsis: Egypt the Cat is a bright, whimsical picture-book series for young readers, following a spirited orange cat and his best friend as they tumble through magic shows, dance floors, road trips, time itself, and the far-off future. Created by young storyteller Ness Uskert and brought to life by illustrator Michael Bryan Quiambao, Egypt the Cat celebrates wonder, friendship, and being born different.

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat in Magic! Magic! Magic! cover: a boy and an orange cat perform a magic act.

issues.title: Egypt the Cat in Magic! Magic! Magic!
issues.synopsis: The show begins! Egypt and his friend take the stage for a magic act where absolutely nothing goes as planned — and everything turns out magical.

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat in Magic! Magic! Magic! cover, cover art by Alyssa Mao.

issues.title: Egypt the Cat in Dance Maniac
issues.synopsis: Egypt discovers he simply cannot stop dancing — and neither will you.

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat in Dance Maniac cover.

issues.title: Egypt the Cat Leaves Los Angeles
issues.synopsis: It's time for a big adventure as Egypt packs up and sets off on the open road.

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat Leaves Los Angeles cover.

issues.title: Egypt the Cat in Time
issues.synopsis: Tick, tock — Egypt tumbles through history in a race against the clock.

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat in Time cover.

issues.title: Egypt the Cat in the Future
issues.synopsis: To the future! Egypt rockets into a world of wonders yet to come.

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat in the Future cover.
